audits.title: The CCY State Chain — From Quoted Price to Audit Reality
audits.description: The CCY State Chain maps eight currency states inside enterprise finance — from quoted price to audit reality. Account Currency is the critical control point at State 04.

audits.title: The CFO Guide to Hidden Account Currency Risk — AccountCcy.com
audits.description: Hidden account currency risk lives in ERP custody and currency-state fragmentation — not only treasury FX. A governance guide for CFOs and finance leaders.

audits.title: The Currency State Control Framework — AccountCcy.com
audits.description: The Currency State Control Framework defines account currency as a financial control discipline from monetary movement to accounting truth in enterprise finance.

audits.title: Account Currency — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Account currency assigns ERP custody for balances — State 04 control gate inside enterprise finance.

audits.title: Account Currency Control — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Account currency control is governance over ERP custody assignments—not occasional reconciliation heroics.

audits.title: Audit Reality — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Audit reality is defensible monetary truth — terminal CCY State Chain posture traceable from quote through consolidation.

audits.title: Chain of Custody — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Chain of custody in finance is the ordered evidence path monetary signals follow before becoming truth.

audits.title: Consolidation Currency — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Consolidation currency unifies group reporting — State 07 absorbing translations, eliminations, ownership drift.

audits.title: Currency State — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: A currency state is a named phase where enterprise finance assigns monetary identity—distinct from ‘currency’ alone.

audits.title: Currency State Control Framework — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: The Currency State Control Framework governs monetary custody across currency states—not FX slogans alone.

audits.title: Currency Translation — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Currency translation converts measured results into presentation currency—State 06 visibility discipline.

audits.title: Functional Currency — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Functional currency names the primary economic environment lens—typically aligning ledger measurement.

audits.title: FX Revaluation — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: FX revaluation restates monetary balances to ledger currency at period boundaries—State 05 custody mechanics.

audits.title: Account Currency Glossary — Enterprise Finance Reference
audits.description: Conceptual authority map for AccountCcy terminology — custody doctrine, currency-state architecture, enterprise accounting controls, and audit-facing reporting language.

audits.title: Ledger Currency — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Ledger currency houses the entity trial balance — State 05 aligned with functional books discipline.

audits.title: Monetary Truth — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Monetary truth is accounting-defensible money figures traceable through custody—not optimism or dashboards alone.

audits.title: Quoted Currency — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Quoted currency names the FX lens before obligation exists — State 01 of the CCY State Chain.

audits.title: Reporting Currency — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Reporting currency frames outward visibility — State 06 where translation policy reshapes disclosed narratives.

audits.title: Settlement Currency — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Settlement currency is the denomination of cash movement — State 03 bridging obligation to liquidity.

audits.title: Transaction Currency — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Transaction currency denominates the recorded obligation — State 02 where measurable duties begin.

audits.title: AccountCcy.com — The Chain of Custody for Monetary Truth
audits.description: Sovereign reference for account currency control and the custody chain from monetary movement to accounting truth in enterprise finance.

audits.title: The Chain of Custody for Monetary Truth — AccountCcy.com
audits.description: Monetary truth is custody across currency states, ledger rules, FX, translation, and audit evidence—not isolated figures. AccountCcy.com maps enterprise lineage.

audits.title: Account Currency — State 04 — The Critical Control Point
audits.description: Account currency assigns custody for balances in ERP — State 04 where movement enters accounting record.

audits.title: Audit Reality — State 08 — The Terminal State of the CCY State Chain
audits.description: Audit reality: monetary figures traceable, reconciled, and defensible under scrutiny — the terminal custody state of the CCY State Chain.

audits.title: Consolidation Currency — State 07 of the CCY State Chain
audits.description: Consolidation currency unifies entity reporting into the group currency. State 07 — peak FX translation complexity before audit narratives finalize.

audits.title: Ledger Currency — State 05 of the CCY State Chain
audits.description: Ledger currency is the currency in which an entity's general ledger is maintained. State 05 — typically aligned with functional currency under accounting standards.

audits.title: Quoted Currency — State 01 of the CCY State Chain
audits.description: Quoted currency expresses market prices before obligation — State 01 before accounting custody in the CCY State Chain.

audits.title: Reporting Currency — State 06 of the CCY State Chain
audits.description: Reporting currency presents financial results for management, regulators, or investors. State 06 — translation gains and losses emerge in visibility layers.

audits.title: Settlement Currency — State 03 of the CCY State Chain
audits.description: Settlement currency is cash-movement currency — State 03; divergence from transaction FX seeds downstream consequences.

audits.title: Transaction Currency — State 02 of the CCY State Chain
audits.description: Transaction currency denominates the financial event — State 02 where obligation identity forms before custody assignment.

audits.title: What Is Account Currency? — Definition and Control Discipline
audits.description: Account currency is the currency assigned to an account for recording and controlling balances in enterprise finance — the State 04 control point.
